TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay_Jacob_Zuma, title = Jacob_Zuma, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Atayal]}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/wiki/Jacob_Zuma} }

S.FORM: Jacob Zuma ryax sa tay 12 nqu tay 4, Jacob Zuma, squliq na sezi'. (minhtuw sa kawas tay 1942) mrhuw South africa ta' misuw hya' ga Jacob Zuma, aring ryax tay 9 squ byacing tay 5 sa kawas 2009 lga, musa' spazyang balay ms'rux kya la. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru'

Jacob Zuma ryax sa tay 12 nqu tay 4, Jacob Zuma, squliq na sezi'. (minhtuw sa kawas tay 1942) mrhuw South africa ta' misuw hya' ga Jacob Zuma, aring ryax tay 9 squ byacing tay 5 sa kawas 2009 lga, musa' spazyang balay ms'rux kya la. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru'
S.PHON: *aʦ~ʨoβ zuma rjax s~ɕa taj ** nqu taj *, *aʦ~ʨoβ zuma, s~ɕquliq na s~ɕeziʔ. (minħtuw s~ɕa kawas~ɕ taj ****) mrħuw s~ɕoutħ a*riʦ~ʨa taʔ mis~ɕuw ħjaʔ ɣa *aʦ~ʨoβ zuma, ariŋ rjax taj * s~ɕqu βjaʦ~ʨiŋ taj * s~ɕa kawas~ɕ **** lɣa, mus~ɕaʔ s~ɕpazjaŋ βalaj ms~ɕʔrux kja la. ʦ~ʨinkħulan s~ɕa knitaʔ s~ɕa βrβiruʔ
